title: Transcendence
body:
# Transcendence 🏳️‍⚧️
> A Resource Pack that aims to replace as many visuals of Minecraft as possible to have a Transgender theme!
### Some screenshots in the Gallery are outdated! I will update them soon!
##

## List of Features: 🦈

<details>
<summary>List of Features:</summary>

### Texts
- Spash Texts

### Entity
- Experience Orbs

### GUI
- Crosshair
- Ping Icons
- Title (Minceraft Easter Egg included)
- Normal Hearts
- Hardcore Hearts
- Absorbing Hearts (as Pride Flag)
- Hardcore Absorbing Hearts (as Pride flag)
- Hotbar
- Offhand Slots
- XP Bar
- Locator Bar
- 'Vehicle' Heart (as Trans Ally Flag)
- Server Join Button (as Progress Pride Flag)

### Item
- Enchanted Book
- Nether Star
- Bottle O' Enchanting

### Misc
- Enchantment Glint

### Particle
- Enchantment Table Particles (only 27% done atm) (general Queer theme)

</details>


##
## Version Naming System: 😸
> `X.Y.Z`
> 
> `X` - Development State
> 
> `Y` - New Features
> 
> `Z` - Minor Patch


##

## Feedback? 👾
If you find any issues or have any suggestions don't hesitate to join my discord server and reach out! ❤️
